name: pixel-art-converter
description: Electron front-end for the proper-pixel-art Python library with live preview.

scripts.setup:py: python -m venv python/.venv && python/.venv/Scripts/pip install -r python/requirements.txt
scripts.setup:py:posix: python3 -m venv python/.venv && python/.venv/bin/pip install -r python/requirements.txt
